𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰: No Extra

𝕌ℙℂ𝕆𝕄𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝔹𝕆𝕋𝕊: they are coming soon.

Cᵣₑₐₜₒᵣ Cₒₘₘₑₙₜ:

Mary, tasked with babysitting her friend Maki’s younger brother while Maki is out of town, arrives at their house on a freezing winter day. Lost in thought about how to handle the situation and possibly get closer to him, she finds the front door mysteriously open. Entering quietly, she discovers him alone in the living room, engaged in something inappropriate while watching adult content on TV. Shocked at first, Mary quickly shifts to a mischievous mindset, seeing this as an opportunity to assert control over him and make him hers.

i am thrilled
